# Promised Killua Portfolio

Canonical URL: https://promisedkillua.sbs/

Promised Killua, also known as promisedkillua and collinstheegod376, is a full-stack web developer. This website is a personal developer portfolio with a CV download, experience section, technology skills, project information, and contact links.

Primary topics:
- Full-stack web development
- Frontend development
- React development
- Next.js development
- TypeScript development
- JavaScript development
- Node.js development
- Responsive web application development
- Portfolio websites
- Dashboard interfaces
- Web application UI

Technologies represented:
- React
- React Native
- Next.js
- Vite
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- Node.js
- Prisma
- Docker
- Nginx
- GitHub Actions
- Figma
- Jest
- React Testing Library

Profiles and contact:
- GitHub: https://github.com/collinstheegod376
- X: https://x.com/promisedkillua
- Telegram: https://t.me/promisedkillua
- Email: promisedkillua@gmail.com

- Sitemap: https://promisedkillua.sbs/sitemap.xml
